verse_text: But I say, did Israel not know? First Moses says: 'I will provoke you to jealousy by those who are not a nation, I will move you to anger by a foolish nation.'

pericope.title: God Elects a Remnant of Israel

links.context: This is a prophecy concerning the Gentiles who would become God's children through faith in Christ, thus provoking the Jews to jealousy ([[ROM.10:19]]). The Speaker in this prophecy (vv. 20, 21) is the Word and Son of God (AthanG; HilryP).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
